title: Israeli Strikes Pummel Lebanon, Killing Medics Amid Fragile Truce
summary_full: Saturday’s strikes damaged a main hospital in the Lebanese city of Tyre, as funerals for paramedics killed a day earlier were held.
summary_public: Saturday’s strikes damaged a main hospital in the Lebanese city of Tyre, as funerals for paramedics killed a day earlier were held.
